2603.25176.title: Prompt Attack Detection with LLM-as-a-Judge and Mixture-of-Models
2603.25176.paper_summary: Prompt attacks, including jailbreaks and prompt injections, pose a critical security risk to Large Language Model (LLM) systems. In production, guardrails must mitigate these attacks under strict low-latency constraints, resulting in a deployment gap in which lightweight classifiers and rule-based systems struggle to generalize under distribution shift, while high-capacity LLM-based judges remain too slow or costly for live enforcement. In this work, we examine whether lightweight, general-purpose LLMs can reliably serve as security judges under real-world production constraints. Through careful prompt and output design, lightweight LLMs are guided through a structured reasoning process involving explicit intent decomposition, safety-signal verification, harm assessment, and self-reflection. We evaluate our method on a curated dataset combining benign queries from real-world chatbots with adversarial prompts generated via automated red teaming (ART), covering diverse and evolving patterns. Our results show that general-purpose LLMs, such as gemini-2.0-flash-lite-001, can serve as effective low-latency judges for live guardrails. This configuration is currently deployed in production as a centralized guardrail service for public service chatbots in Singapore. We additionally evaluate a Mixture-of-Models (MoM) setting to assess whether aggregating multiple LLM judges improves prompt-attack detection performance relative to single-model judges, with only modest gains observed.
2603.25176.paper_summary_zh: 提示攻擊，包括越獄和提示注入，對大型語言模型（LLM）系統構成了重大安全風險。在生產環境中，防護措施必須在嚴格的低延遲限制下減輕這些攻擊，這導致了一個部署差距，其中輕量級分類器和基於規則的系統在分佈轉移下難以泛化，而高容量的基於LLM的判斷者對於實時執行來說則過於緩慢或昂貴。在這項工作中，我們檢查輕量級通用LLM是否能在現實生產限制下可靠地作為安全判斷者。通過仔細的提示和輸出設計，輕量級LLM被引導通過一個結構化的推理過程，涉及明確的意圖分解、安全信號驗證、傷害評估和自我反思。我們在一個策劃的數據集上評估我們的方法，該數據集結合了來自現實世界聊天機器人的良性查詢和通過自動紅隊（ART）生成的對抗性提示，涵蓋多樣且不斷演變的模式。我們的結果顯示，通用LLM，如gemini-2.0-flash-lite-001，可以作為實時防護措施的有效低延遲判斷者。該配置目前已在新加坡作為公共服務聊天機器人的集中防護服務投入生產。我們還評估了一種混合模型（MoM）設置，以評估聚合多個LLM判斷者是否能相對於單模型判斷者提高提示攻擊檢測性能，僅觀察到適度的增益。
2603.25176.author: Hieu Xuan Le et.al.
2603.25176.authors: Hieu Xuan Le, Benjamin Goh, Quy Anh Tang
